ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "code" TEXT /* Course code (e.g., GE1401) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "credit" INTEGER /* Credit hours assigned to the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "levels" TEXT /* Levels of the course (e.g., B for undergraduate) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the course */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats available in the course */,
  "waitlist_available" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a waitlist is available for the course */,
  "web_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the course is web-enabled */,
  "catalog_description" TEXT /* Detailed course description from the catalog */,
  "course_objectives" TEXT /* Course objectives and outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "chair_name" TEXT /* Name of the department chair */,
  "chair_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department chair */,
  "chair_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department chair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructor_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor with the permission */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the permission is for */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructor_permissions_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructor_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the course (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructor_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Waitlisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is waitlisted for */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_position" INTEGER /* Position of the student on the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment history entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student with the enrollment history */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student was enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade the student received in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was submitted */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor assignment */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor serving as the advisor */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being advised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being analyzed */,
  "enrollment_trend" TEXT /* Enrollment trend for the course (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "student_performance" TEXT /* Student performance metrics (e.g., average grade, pass rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
